description.value: Codes representing personal, cultural, and lifestyle considerations that may influence how an individual engages with health care, makes care decisions, and experiences care delivery.

copyright.value: This material derives from the HL7 Terminology (THO). THO is copyright ©1989+ Health Level Seven International and is made available under the CC0 designation. For more licensing information see: https://terminology.hl7.org/license

definition.value: An individual's personal beliefs about health and health care that may affect their care preferences or decisions.
An individual's cultural preferences that may affect their care preferences or decisions.
An individual's adherence to a formal religious tradition or set of religious practices that may affect their care preferences or decisions.
An individual's spiritual orientation or belief system that may affect their care preferences or decisions.
A specific dietary pattern followed by an individual (e.g., Halal, Kosher, Pescatarian, Vegetarian, Vegan) that may affect their care preferences or decisions.
An individual's role as a caregiver for another person that may affect their care preferences or decisions.
